findings.description: Knowledge file has 5 sections while the source has 9 h3-level headings (全体像, StandaloneTestSupportTemplate, TestShot, BatchRequestTestSupport, MainForRequestTesting, FileSupport, 固定長ファイル, 可変長ファイル, ディレクティブのデフォルト値). The 構造 h2 section — which is long enough (5 h3 subsections with substantive content) to warrant splitting — is compressed into only 2 knowledge sections (s2 and s3). While 全体像 (image only) and 可変長ファイル (navigation reference only) are correctly omitted, the remaining 7 h3 sections are merged into 5 knowledge sections.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 sections under 構造: StandaloneTestSupportTemplate, TestShot, BatchRequestTestSupport, MainForRequestTesting, FileSupport — each with distinct roles, tables, and descriptions.
